fields.name: No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the involved entry or record, according to the specified number series.

fields.name: VAT Report Config. Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the appropriate configuration code for EC Sales List Reports.

fields.name: VAT Report Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies if you want to create a new VAT report, or if you want to change a previously submitted report.

fields.name: Start Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the first date of the reporting period.

fields.name: End Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the last date of the EC sales list report.

fields.name: Status
fields.tooltip: Specifies the status of the report, such as Open or Submitted.

fields.name: No. Series
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number series from which entry or record numbers are assigned to new entries or records.

fields.name: Original Report No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the original report.

fields.name: Period Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies the length of the reporting period.

fields.name: Period No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the EC sales list reporting period to use.

fields.name: Period Year
fields.tooltip: Specifies the year of the reporting period.

fields.name: Message Id
fields.tooltip: Specifies the message ID of the report listing sales to other EU countries/regions.

fields.name: Statement Template Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the statement template from the EC Sales List Report.

fields.name: Statement Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the statement from the EC Sales List Report.

fields.name: VAT Report Version
fields.tooltip: Specifies the version of the VAT report.

fields.name: Additional Information
fields.tooltip: Specifies the additional information must be added to VAT report.

fields.name: Created Date-Time
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date when the VAT report lines were created.

fields.name: Country/Region Filter
fields.tooltip: Specifies the country/region filter for the report.

fields.name: Amounts in Add. Rep. Currency
fields.tooltip: Specifies whether the amounts are in the additional reporting currency.
